summary.zh: Claude Code 換核心，Codex 縮減上下文
summary.en: Claude Code adopts Rust-Bun; Codex shrinks context.

summary.en: Claude Fable 5 becomes permanent as GPT-5.6 achieves a major mathematical breakthrough.

summary.en: Inkling and Kimi K3 lead open-weights surge; Linus Torvalds defends AI in Linux.

summary.en: Apple sues OpenAI over trade secrets, xAI CLI leaks user repos, and Anthropic extends Fable 5 access.
